description:
Kling Video O1 (Omni) - unified video generation with references.

Modes determined by inputs:
- Text-to-video: prompt only (aspect_ratio required)
- Image-to-video: prompt + image (first frame)
- Start/end frame: prompt + image + end_image
- Reference generation: prompt + reference_images / reference_video

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video. Use <<<image_1>>>, <<<element_1>>>, <<<video_1>>> to reference inputs. Max 2500 chars.
examples: A serene lake at sunset with birds flying overhead
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: First-frame reference image. Sets the opening frame of the video.
image.title: Image

end_image.description: End-frame reference image. Requires image (first frame) to be set.
end_image.title: End Image

reference_images.description: Reference images for style, character, or scene consistency. Referenced in prompt as <<<image_1>>>, <<<image_2>>>, etc. Max 7 without video, max 4 with video.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

reference_video.description: Reference video for camera style, motion, or editing. Referenced in prompt as <<<video_1>>>.
reference_video.title: Reference Video

reference_video_type.description: How to use reference video: 'feature' for style/motion reference, 'base' for direct editing/transformation.
reference_video_type.title: Reference Video Type

keep_original_sound.description: Keep original sound from reference video (only applies when reference_video is set).
keep_original_sound.title: Keep Original Sound

mode.description: Generation quality. 'pro' for highest quality, 'std' for faster/cheaper.

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. Required for text-to-video and reference generation (not needed when using first-frame image or video editing).

duration.description: Video duration in seconds (3-10). For video editing, output matches input video duration.
duration.title: Duration

watermark.description: Add watermark to the output video.
watermark.title: Watermark

title: AppInput
